title: Persistent Volumes — Phase
text:
A PersistentVolume will be in one of the following phases:
You can see the name of the PVC bound to the PV using
kubectl describe persistentvolume <name>
.
The
.status
field for a PersistentVolume can include an alpha
lastPhaseTransitionTime
field. This field records
the timestamp of when the volume last transitioned its phase. For newly created
volumes the phase is set to
Pending
and
lastPhaseTransitionTime
is set to
the current time.
